description: Render a CSV (first column = x, remaining columns = y series) into a publication-styled figure and save it with a specific journal's required formats + DPI via save_for_journal().
rules: read-only with respect to inputs; only writes under record_store
JOURNAL must be one of nature|science|cell|plos|acs|ieee; FIGURE_TYPE one of line_art|photo|combination
formats and DPI are taken from the journal spec table, not chosen by the caller
degrades gracefully (writes a non-empty manifest, exits 0) when matplotlib/numpy are absent or the journal is unknown
usage: Set DATA_CSV (CSV with header + numeric columns). Optional JOURNAL (default nature) and FIGURE_TYPE (default combination). Outputs: journal_export.json manifest plus figure.<fmt> files.
limitation: Produces a simple multi-series line plot only. Figure files require matplotlib + numpy present; EPS/TIFF output additionally needs the relevant matplotlib backends.
